titlestmt.titleproper: Office of the Senior Vice President records4-4-2076

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Office of the Senior Vice President records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Office of the Senior Vice President

did.abstract: Records of Senior Vice President William G. Herbster.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Records of Senior Vice President William G. Herbster include correspondence, applications, minutes, reports, and other material pertaining to campus buildings; parking; budgets; planning; energy conservation; tuition; the Cornell Medical School and Nursing School; the National Institutes of Health; Boyce-Thompson Institute; CALSPAN (Cornell Aeronautical Laboratory); Shoals Marine Laboratory; Africana Studies; minority education; South Africa; Frontlash; the Freedom of Information Act; labor relations, personnel policy, and wages; the Self Governance Commission; Title IX, affirmative action, and the Bakke case; the Status of Women Committee; the Cornell University Press; computers; the Cranch, Bucklin, and Schultz Committees; alumni; athletics; Johnson Wax; and the July Fessenden-Raden Study. Names included are William V. Campbell, Deane Malott, Laing Kennedy, Richard Moran, William A. Stowe, Ken Kraft, James L. Jones, Christine H. B. Grant, William B. Putnam, Carl R. Meyer, Richard S. Sakala, Mrs. Morris Bishop, July Fessenden-Raden, Matthew McHugh, William Pierpont, Ben Bluitt, Howard Molisani, and Harold Uris.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University. Office of the Senior Vice President records, #4-4-2076. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.
